item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-037","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"首句直接以“要不要下单”的购买决策语境定标，明确说B更接近实用结论，并把A的物理PPI事实降级为边界条件。后续条件区分也服务于下单建议，没有落入“都对、层级不同”的对称抽象。"}
